title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Delhivery Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Delhivery Ventures Solutions family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
